topPlaces.name: Chhinnamasta Temple, Rajrappa
topPlaces.description: Chhinnamastika Temple is a Hindu temple, dedicated to Goddess Chinnamasta is a Hindu pilgrimage centre located in Rajrappa, in Ramgarh district of Jharkhand, India. The place attracts devotees from all parts of Jharkhand, and also from the neighbouring states of West Bengal and Bihar.

topPlaces.name: Sewai
topPlaces.description: Sewai is a census town in the Chitarpur (community development block) CD block in the Ramgarh subdivision of the Ramgarh district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Ramgarh Coalfield
topPlaces.description: Ramgarh Coalfield are located in Ramgarh district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Rajrappa Area
topPlaces.description: Rajrappa Area is one of the operational areas of the Central Coalfields Limited located in the Ramgarh district in the state of Jharkhand, India. The projects of the Rajrappa Area are: Rajrappa OCP and Rajrappa Washery.

topPlaces.name: Chitarpur
topPlaces.description: Chitarpur (also written as Chitar Pur) is a census town in the Chitarpur CD block in the Ramgarh subdivision of the Ramgarh district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Chitarpur (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Chitarpur (community development block) is an administrative division in the Ramgarh subdivision of the Ramgarh district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Mahuatand
topPlaces.description: Mahuatand is a village in the Gomia CD block in the Bermo subdivision of the Bokaro district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Jama Mosque, Ramgarh
topPlaces.description: The Jame Mosque, or Jama Masjid, is a Friday mosque located in Chitarpur town in the Ramgarh district in the state of Jharkhand, India. Built in 1670 by Mughal rulers in the Mughal style, it is one of the oldest mosques of the state.

items.note: Chhinnamastika Temple is a Hindu temple, dedicated to Goddess Chinnamasta is a Hindu pilgrimage centre located in Rajrappa, in Ramgarh district of Jharkhand, India. The place attracts devotees from all parts of Jharkhand, and also from the neighbouring states of West Bengal and Bihar.
Sewai is a census town in the Chitarpur (community development block) CD block in the Ramgarh subdivision of the Ramgarh district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.
Ramgarh Coalfield are located in Ramgarh district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

Rajrappa Area is one of the operational areas of the Central Coalfields Limited located in the Ramgarh district in the state of Jharkhand, India. The projects of the Rajrappa Area are: Rajrappa OCP and Rajrappa Washery.
Chitarpur (also written as Chitar Pur) is a census town in the Chitarpur CD block in the Ramgarh subdivision of the Ramgarh district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.
Chitarpur (community development block) is an administrative division in the Ramgarh subdivision of the Ramgarh district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.
Mahuatand is a village in the Gomia CD block in the Bermo subdivision of the Bokaro district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

The Jame Mosque, or Jama Masjid, is a Friday mosque located in Chitarpur town in the Ramgarh district in the state of Jharkhand, India. Built in 1670 by Mughal rulers in the Mughal style, it is one of the oldest mosques of the state.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rajrappa?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rajrappa is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (53 km) and the nearest railway station is Ranchi Junction (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rajrappa?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rajrappa at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rajrappa?
faq.a: Stays in Rajrappa start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rajrappa?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chhinnamasta Temple, Rajrappa, Sewai, Ramgarh Coalfield, Rajrappa Area, Chitarpur.
